actions.description: Log in using admin@example.com and admin123 from prerequisites

actions.instruction: Navigate to the extensions admin page
actions.description: Navigate to the extensions admin page
Verify the installed extension card is visible

actions.instruction: Click the "..." (more actions) button on that card to open the context menu
actions.description: Click the '...' (more actions) button on the extension card to open the context menu

actions.instruction: Click "Check for Updates" in the context menu
actions.description: Click 'Check for Updates' in the context menu

actions.instruction: Observe the action tag changes to "Upgrading..."
actions.description: Take a screenshot to observe the action tag changes to 'Upgrading...'

actions.instruction: Wait for the success toast "Extension upgraded successfully"
actions.description: Wait for success toast indicating the extension has been upgraded successfully

actions.instruction: Verify the extension card is still visible and functional
actions.description: Verify the extension card is still visible after the upgrade
